---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Why does it matter?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches a chain or anchor, describe how it fits
behind a port (RailPort / WatcherPort / OffRampPort) rather than in the domain.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or anything else.
